planets.name: Nosilverv
planets.summary: Archive cluster around nosilverv: 16980 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Nosilverv receipt from 2023-12-26
artifacts.excerpt:
I was only 19 years old when I discovered that 
-narratives you have in your head affect the way you feel 
And I deduced 
- you can make up new ones 

I made up a few stories about myself that had the same life facts but totally opposite conclusions and realised a super power 😇

planets.name: Don
planets.summary: Archive cluster around don: 947 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2025-09-21
artifacts.excerpt:
I used to read 100s of books I loved philosophy, theory and language itself, I would yap all day it was my favourite hobby and when I finally had insight during meditation it all dropped away 

All of it 

Now I don’t read, barely want to speak 

Be warned
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, think, want.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-01-14
artifacts.excerpt: Get spaciousness. Open up the prison in your mind. Be suspicious of all your “have to…” thoughts. If you “have to” work this job or “have to” live in this place or you “have to” have this romantic partner: no you don’t. Get a technique you like that opens up new ways of thinking
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, think, want.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-10-11
artifacts.excerpt:
Folks, I’ve noticed it is extremely common for someone with a “meaning hole” or depression to try to fix it by “saving” other people, whether its family, community of the world. 

They don’t do so very well and its also not humane to let them do this before they relieve theirself

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2025-09-27
artifacts.excerpt:
Hey I think the algo is currently trying to favour more clustered friend groups. I Frequently see tweets just because another mutual has replied to it.

Discovering new ppl might be harder but if you want a good timeline it’s all about reply game (always has been)

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2024-08-30
artifacts.excerpt: One feature of Kegan level that Cook-Greuter found was how far in the future one can think/plan. Kegan 4 is needed to be able to think or plan 10+years into the future (<40% of pop). This means only Kegan 4 adults can understand compound interest, the stock market, mortgages etc.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2020-02-23
artifacts.excerpt:
Meta-rats talking:

metarat1: heads
metarat2: I agree, but also tails
metarat1: yes I agree about tails

both in unison: this is the same coin

metarat1: but it's good to argue the side for heads
metarat2: yes, and also for tails

both in unison: yes
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, really, other, time.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2025-03-19
artifacts.excerpt:
We still have to ink the full deal however JessCamp4 has a venue! What we know so far:
- in Portugal, 1hr outside Porto
- accommodation is 100% camping / tents
- large communal kitchen
- three workshop rooms, one enormous, one medium, one small 
- large outdoor swimming pool
- sauna 
- compost loos and indoor & outdoor showers/loos
- noise is very much allowed! 
- smoking allowed! 
- temperature 30-35 degrees C
- next to a river which is part of the property - naked swimming allowed in our spot, river has sandy beaches 
- amazing old buildings to explore 
- whole site is designed as a responsible playground 
- campervans welcome 
- parking for 10 cars
- laundry room
- good WiFi throughout 
- secondary kitchen for brunch
- professional chef for dinner 
- August 7th-11th 25
🚀
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, really, other, time.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2026-05-03
artifacts.excerpt:
One of the most useful things I read in a self help book was that no matter how close you are to them, you DONT know what the other person is actually thinking or feeling. 

It’s good to be attuned, but you have to ask, AND build a place of trust so that they can answer truthfuly

Oh no I’ve realised the two types of people here. 99% have ADD or whatever and are addicted to the dopamine cycle.

It’s lurkers vs posters. I’m sorry.

planets.name: Know

artifacts.title: Know receipt from 2025-12-30
artifacts.excerpt:
I have personally seen:

The worst person I know with consent teach consent workshops 

People with huge anger issues teach how to manage anger classes 

People who are locked into misery politics teach people how to be existentially happy via philosophy 

What. The. Fuck.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: know, other, didn, let.

artifacts.title: Know receipt from 2025-05-20
artifacts.excerpt: In all seriousness I need you guys to know that I’m on a call with the venue tomorrow and top of the agenda is whether to cancel JessCamp. I’ve only sold 25 tickets and need 55 to pay them. I need 65 to get food for y’all. It’s 10 weeks away but everyone is getting twitchy.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: know, other, didn, let.

artifacts.title: Know receipt from 2026-04-01
artifacts.excerpt: Let’s try again. I really easily trigger people with narcissism wounds because of how I am. They have a very familiar pattern when they are triggered that I won’t repeat here because they might stop doing it if they know. But please trust it’s an unmistakable pattern.
